lines.text_source: Hmm, hm hm...
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Hmm, hm hm...

lines.text_source: Kuon boils the water I'd fetched for her in a\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Kuon ferve a água que busquei para ela numa\n

lines.text_source: large, metallic tub, humming to herself.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: grande banheira de metal, cantarolando.

lines.text_source: I lost count of how many trips it took to get\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: noting how many trips it took
lines.base_translation: Perdi a conta de quantas viagens precisei fazer\n

lines.text_source: enough water to fill that thing up...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: para encher aquela coisa toda...

lines.text_source: What is she boiling all this water for, anyway?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: wondering what the water is for
lines.base_translation: Para que ela está fervendo tanta água, afinal?

lines.text_source: It's not like she's cooking a hotpot or something.\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Não parece que ela está cozinhando um ensopado.\n

lines.text_source: We just ate, and there's way too much for that.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: A gente acabou de comer, e é água demais pra isso.

lines.text_source: Not that I doubt she'd be able to eat that much.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Não que eu duvide que ela consiga comer tudo isso.
lines.risk_notes: Gênero de Kuon implícito mas não problemático; tom cômico leve.

lines.text_source: Hmm, hm hm... The water's juuuust about right.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Hmm, hm hm... A água está no ponto certo.

lines.text_source: She tests the water with her hand, then--apparently\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ela testa a água com a mão e então — aparentemente\n

lines.text_source: satisfied--pours it into a different tub.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: satisfeita — despeja numa outra banheira.

lines.text_source: The remaining water goes back on top of the fire,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: O restante da água vai de volta ao fogo,\n

lines.text_source: and she adds more from the buckets I'd fetched.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: e ela acrescenta mais dos baldes que busquei.

lines.text_source: She's going through water like it's going out of\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ela está gastando água como se não houvesse\n

lines.text_source: style, here.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: amanhã.

lines.text_source: I'm probably going to feel stupid for asking, but\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Vou me sentir idiota por perguntar, mas...\n

lines.text_source: what are you doing?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: O que você tá fazendo?

lines.text_source: Preparing a bath, obviously.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Preparando um banho, obviamente.

lines.text_source: Yeah, I had a feeling. I didn't think she'd go\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Sim, eu desconfiava. Não achei que ela fosse\n

lines.text_source: through all this trouble, though.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: se dar ao trabalho todo, porém.

lines.text_source: You're going out of your way to boil all that\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: questioning effort for bath at campsite
lines.base_translation: Você vai ferver toda essa água no meio\n

lines.text_source: water in the middle of a campground...?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: de um acampamento...?

lines.text_source: Sure. A bath feels great after proper hard work.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: affirming that baths are worth it
lines.base_translation: Claro. Um banho é ótimo depois de um bom trabalho.

lines.text_source: "Proper hard work." But I'm the one who went\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: noting he did the actual work
lines.base_translation: "Um bom trabalho." Mas fui eu que me dei\n

lines.text_source: through all the trouble...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ao trabalho todo...

lines.text_source: Step back a bit, would you, Haku?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Recue um pouco, tá, Haku?

lines.text_source: My griping falls on deaf ears as Kuon drapes a\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: describing Kuon ignoring him and setting up partition
lines.base_translation: Minhas reclamações caem no vazio enquanto Kuon drapa\n

lines.text_source: large sheet over a string to make a partition.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: um lençol numa corda para fazer uma divisória.

lines.text_source: The telltale rustling of clothes is perfectly\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: O farfalhar inconfundível de roupas é perfeitamente\n

lines.text_source: audible through the partition.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: audível através da divisória.

lines.text_source: She's as brazen as always...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Descarada como sempre...

lines.text_source: But to think she'd go to such lengths just for a\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: marveling at effort just for a bath
lines.base_translation: Mas pensar que ela se daria a tal trabalho só por\n

lines.text_source: bath. She must REALLY enjoy them.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: um banho. Ela REALMENTE adora isso.

lines.text_source: *Splish*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Ploft*...

lines.text_source: Ahh... This is just what I needed.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Ahh... Era exatamente isso que eu precisava.

lines.text_source: She must have lowered herself into the water, for\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ela deve ter se abaixado na água, pois\n

lines.text_source: a soft exclamation of comfort wafts over the\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: um suave suspiro de conforto flutua pela\n

lines.text_source: barrier.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: divisória.

lines.text_source: You like baths that much, huh?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: asking if she really likes baths that much
lines.base_translation: Você gosta tanto assim de banho?

lines.text_source: Mhm. Very much.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Sim. Muito mesmo.

lines.text_source: Washing away a hard day's sweat with a hot bath\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: explaining why hot baths are the best
lines.base_translation: Lavar o suor do dia com um banho quente\n

lines.text_source: is the best feeling there is.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: é a melhor sensação do mundo.

lines.text_source: Honestly, if I had my way I'd take two a day, but\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: wishing she could bathe twice a day
lines.base_translation: Honestamente, se eu pudesse, tomaria dois por dia,\n

lines.text_source: I suppose beggars can't be choosers.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: mas nem sempre dá pra ter tudo que quer.

lines.text_source: ...What, is she waiting for some kind of quip for\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: wondering if she expects a witty comeback
lines.base_translation: ...O que, ela está esperando algum comentário\n

lines.text_source: that? A retort?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: esperto? Uma resposta?

lines.text_source: Do you do this all the time when you're out\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: asking if she always does this while traveling
lines.base_translation: Você faz isso sempre quando está\n

lines.text_source: traveling like this?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: viajando assim?

lines.text_source: Mm. I know it's a bit extravagant, but as long as\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Sim. Sei que é um pouco extravagante, mas enquanto\n

lines.text_source: I prepare it myself, it's not like I'm bothering\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: eu mesma preparo, não estou incomodando\n

lines.text_source: anyone.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: ninguém.

lines.text_source: I'm the one who did all the heavy lifting,\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: noting he did all the heavy work
lines.base_translation: Fui eu que carguei tudo isso,\n

lines.text_source: though...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: porém...

lines.text_source: So, thanks. I'm grateful for you helping me out.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Por isso, obrigada. Fico grata pela sua ajuda.

lines.text_source: Nngh. Sharp as always.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: reacting to her sharp, disarming reply
lines.base_translation: Nngh. Afiada como sempre.

lines.text_source: I lean back and lounge against our piled\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Me recosto e me esparamo nas nossas\n

lines.text_source: belongings, exhausted.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: bagagens, exausto.

lines.text_source: *Sssslip--*
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Esguicho--*

lines.text_source: Then, shifting in a chain reaction, the part of\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Então, numa reação em cadeia, a parte\n

lines.text_source: the string held up by our bags shifts--
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: da corda sustentada pelas bolsas cede--

lines.text_source: *Flutter*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Flapt*...

lines.text_source: Guh--
lines.speaker: Man
lines.base_translation: Agh--

lines.text_source: Hmm~
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Hmm~

lines.text_source: W-Wait, why did--
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: reacting in panic to partition falling
lines.base_translation: E-Espera, por que--

lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: describing Kuon oblivious with washcloth over eyes

lines.text_source: her eyes with a washcloth, oblivious.

lines.base_translation: os olhos com uma toalha, alheia a tudo.

lines.text_source: She keeps humming to herself, kicking her legs in\n

lines.intent: describing her humming and kicking legs

lines.text_source: the water.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: na água.

lines.text_source: ...I admit it's a pleasant sight, but I can't ogle\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: admitting it's pleasant but he shouldn't look
lines.base_translation: ...Admito que é uma visão agradável, mas não posso\n
lines.risk_notes: Cena de fanservice; tom conflitado deve ser mantido sem ser excessivo.

lines.text_source: her like this.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ficar encarando assim.

lines.text_source: almost hypnotizing.

lines.base_translation: é quase hipnotizante.

lines.text_source: N-Not good. Not good at all.

lines.intent: telling himself this is not good

lines.text_source: No, no, calm down. It was an accident, and knowing\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: trying to calm down, it was an accident

lines.base_translation: a Kuon, ela vai sorrir e me perdoar.

lines.base_translation: Ela vai... sorrir...

lines.text_source: And that dangerous tail will be swinging.

lines.base_translation: E aquele rabo perigoso vai estar balançando.

lines.text_source: B-But if I put the partition back the way it was\n

lines.text_source: before it's too late--

lines.base_translation: que seja tarde demais--

lines.text_source: Taking extreme care not to make any noise or draw\n

lines.text_source: attention, I try to pull the sheet back up...

lines.text_source: Hm, hm...

lines.intent: humming quietly while trying to fix partition
lines.base_translation: Hm, hm...

lines.text_source: Good... Slide that back into place like that, then\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: carefully sliding sheet back into place
lines.base_translation: Ótimo... Deslizar de volta no lugar assim, depois\n

lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: só preciso amarrar as pontas e--

lines.text_source: *Slip*...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: *Escorrega*...

lines.text_source: ...Huh?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: ...Hein?

lines.text_source: My hand slips right as I finish, and instead of\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: describing hand slipping at crucial moment
lines.base_translation: Minha mão escorrega bem na hora que termino, e ao\n

lines.text_source: tightening the knot properly, it all comes undone.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: invés de apertar o nó direito, ele se desfaz todo.

lines.text_source: No, what are you doing!? Stop! Just stop! You're\n

lines.intent: yelling at himself to stop making it worse
lines.base_translation: Não, o que você tá fazendo!? Para! Para logo! Você\n

lines.text_source: making it worse!
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: tá piorando tudo!

lines.text_source: Ah, right.

lines.base_translation: Ah, é verdade.

lines.text_source: Kuon pulls the washcloth off of her eyes as though\n

lines.base_translation: Kuon tira o pano dos olhos como se tivesse\n
lines.risk_notes: Cena tensa, risco de fanservice; manter tom ansioso do narrador.

lines.text_source: suddenly remembering something.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: se lembrando de algo de repente.

lines.text_source: Ack--
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ack--

lines.text_source: But without turning around, she reaches for a\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Mas sem se virar, ela pega uma\n

lines.text_source: small bottle and dumps its contents into the\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: describing her pouring a small bottle
lines.base_translation: pequena garrafa e despeja o conteúdo na\n

lines.text_source: water.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: água.

lines.text_source: Ah, that smells nice...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Ah, que cheiro gostoso...

lines.text_source: Then--still oblivious--she re-soaks the washcloth\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Então — ainda alheia a tudo — ela recoloca o pano\n

lines.text_source: and replaces it over her eyes once more.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: sobre os olhos mais uma vez.

lines.text_source: Th-That was close. If she'd turned her head even\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: reflecting how close a call that was
lines.base_translation: Q-Que susto. Se ela tivesse virado a cabeça\n

lines.text_source: a few degrees, it would've been the end.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: uns poucos graus, teria sido o fim.

lines.text_source: Hm, hm~
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Hm, hm~

lines.text_source: Kuon happily swings her legs and hums a tune, a\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: contrasting Kuon's happiness with his stress
lines.base_translation: Kuon balança as pernas feliz e cantarola,\n

lines.text_source: stark contrast with what I'm feeling right now.

lines.base_translation: um contraste total com o que estou sentindo agora.

lines.text_source: Haku, you've gone all quiet. Is something wrong?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.intent: noticing Haku went quiet and asking if something's wrong
lines.base_translation: Haku, você ficou bem quieto. Está tudo bem?

lines.text_source: No, I just dunno what to say. No one else is here,\n

lines.base_translation: Não, é que não sei o que falar. Não tem mais\n

lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ninguém aqui, então fica quieto se eu não falar.

lines.text_source: I suppose. You just got awfully quiet in a hurry,\n

lines.intent: noting he went quiet very suddenly

lines.text_source: and I was worried something was wrong.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: e eu fiquei preocupada se estava tudo bem.

lines.text_source: Hmhm. You weren't thinking about peeking, were\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Hmhm. Você não estava pensando em espiar, estava\n

lines.text_source: you, naughty boy?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: não, seu levado?

lines.text_source: Geh--
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Geh--

lines.text_source: D-D-Don't be ridiculous. Who'd ever do such a\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: denying he would ever do that
lines.base_translation: N-N-Não seja ridícula. Quem faria uma coisa\n

lines.text_source: thing?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: dessas?

lines.text_source: Ahahaha, calm down. I'm just kidding. I know you\n

lines.intent: laughing and saying she's just kidding
lines.base_translation: Ahahaha, relaxa. Tô brincando. Eu sei que você\n

lines.text_source: wouldn't.
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: não faria.

lines.text_source: W-Well, as long as we're clear on that.

lines.base_translation: B-Bom, desde que esteja claro isso.

lines.text_source: Nngh, this isn't weighing well on my conscience--\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Nngh, isso não tá ficando bem na minha consciência--\n

lines.text_source: But I'm NOT peeking! Absolutely not! Not my fault!
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Mas NÃO estava espiando! De jeito nenhum! Não foi culpa minha!

lines.text_source: ...Looks like I've got nothing left but my\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ...Parece que só me resta meu\n

lines.text_source: contingency plan.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: plano de contingência.

lines.text_source: I stealthily tiptoe to the tent's flap.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Me esgueiro na ponta dos pés até a entrada da tenda.

lines.text_source: Yep. No choice but to bail!
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Isso. Não tem outra opção senão fugir!

lines.text_source: Even if she realizes what happened here, she'll\n

lines.intent: rationalizing that she'll drop it by tomorrow

lines.text_source: probably let it drop by tomorrow. Probably...
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: provavelmente vai deixar passar amanhã. Provavelmente...

lines.text_source: ...Maybe Ukon will let me sleep in his tent\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: thinking about sleeping in Ukon's tent

lines.text_source: instead of Kuon's.

lines.base_translation: em vez da de Kuon.

lines.text_source: I creep ever closer toward the exit, and spare a\n

lines.base_translation: imperfeições, corpo firme e ágil, rosto\n

lines.text_source: pleasant...

lines.base_translation: agradável...

lines.text_source: "Exquisite" is a good word for her kind of beauty.

lines.text_source: Haku?

lines.base_translation: Haku?

lines.base_translation: e cai.

lines.text_source: She smiles.

lines.base_translation: Ela sorri.

lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: nada disso--

lines.text_source: I only thought it was a bit of a disappointment\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: inner monologue slipping out — thought she isn't bigger
lines.base_translation: Eu só achei que era meio decepcionante\n
lines.risk_notes: Pensamento interno vaza em narração; comentário sobre físico de Kuon que provoca punição cômica. Manter a ambiguidade do corte antes de revelar o quê.

lines.text_source: that she isn't a little bigger through the ch--\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: ela não ser um pouco maior no pe--\n
lines.risk_notes: A frase é cortada propositalmente antes de completar o comentário sobre o busto; preservar o corte.

lines.text_source: You sighed all disappointedly. What was that\n
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: Você suspirou com tal decepção. O que foi\n

lines.text_source: about?
lines.speaker: Kuon
lines.base_translation: isso?

lines.text_source: I sighed...?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Suspirei...?

lines.text_source: Kuon's prehensile tail curls around the handle of\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: describing Kuon's tail curling around boiling pot
lines.base_translation: O rabo preênsil de Kuon se enrola no cabo\n
lines.risk_notes: Clímax cômico de punição; manter tensão.

lines.text_source: a bubbling, boiling pot and lifts.
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: completing description of pot being lifted
lines.base_translation: de uma panela borbulhando e fervendo, e levanta.

lines.text_source: N-No--Wait, I promise, this is all a\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: N-Não--Espera, juro, é tudo um\n

lines.text_source: misunderstanding!
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: mal-entendido!

lines.text_source: You've got it all wrong, liste--
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: telling her she's got it wrong
lines.base_translation: Você entendeu tudo errado, me ouv--

lines.text_source: AIIEEEEE!!
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: screaming in pain as he gets doused
lines.base_translation: AIIIIIIII!!
